results.note: API state consistency validated via unit tests. Browser state consistency requires web service with OAuth credentials.

evidence.testOutputSummary: Tests validate that API status payload includes required fields for browser comparison

blockers.description: Full VAL-CROSS-007 validation requires browser automation against running web service. Web service cannot start without GitHub OAuth credentials.
blockers.impact: Cannot perform live paired captures of API and browser state
blockers.workaround: Unit tests prove API contract provides required fields; implementation code shows browser consumes these fields consistently
